blogs.title: REST vs gRPC vs GraphQL
blogs.description: A comprehensive comparison of REST, gRPC, and GraphQL API paradigms covering architecture, performance, tooling, and when to use each approach in modern system design

blogs.title: DNS & HTTP Fundamentals
blogs.description: A deep dive into DNS resolution, record types, HTTP protocol evolution, caching strategies, and CDN fundamentals for system design interviews and real-world architecture
